provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official programme-specific PDF identifies Programme A5B107, Year of Entry 2026/27 and publishes 40 unique coded courses: 32 under Major Course List and 8 under Education Studies Course List. The official programme page separately publishes the 156-cp domain totals (Major 71, Education Studies 30, Field Experience 22, General Education 18, Language Enhancement 9 and Final Year Project 6), but neither source publishes per-course credit points or Year/Semester assignments. The PDF does not separate most Major courses into Discipline Studies Major versus Education Major, does not separate Education Studies into Core, Restricted Elective and Pedagogy subgroups, and does not publish selection rules. Field Experience, General Education, Language Enhancement and Final Year Project have no programme-specific coded lists and are omitted rather than assigned invented codes. This supplement exposes only the verified published course subset and does not present it as a complete 156-cp graduation structure.
